full_text:
Xin Ping (Zhongzhi) 辛評 (仲治)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xin Ping (辛評), styledZhongzhi (仲治), was born in Yingchuan. An officer of Han Fu, he later served the Yuan’s loyally when Fu fled. Xin Ping was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty, Yuan Shao, and Yuan Tan. Xin Ping lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
